overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a pirate character in a red coat and tricorn hat exploring a colonial Caribbean port town. The character walks through covered stone arcades, ascends to an open town square with palm trees, navigates narrow streets, and finally reaches a harbor with tall wooden ships moored at wooden docks.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone arcade with arches and skylights

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered stone arcade, passing wooden carts and stone columns

notable_agents.action: pushing a wooden cart along the corridor wall

entered.detail: stone archway ceiling with glass skylights allowing natural light
large stone archway forming the corridor passage
weathered blue painted stone wall with chipped paint
wooden push cart with goods parked against the wall

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered stone arcade with high arched ceilings and blue painted walls. The corridor is lined with stone columns and barred windows, with a wooden cart visible to the left. Natural light filters through glass skylights above.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase transition from covered arcade to open square

events.description: exits covered stone arcade and begins ascending stairs into open air
turns right at top of stairs to enter town square

agents.ego_description: ascending wide stone stairs from covered arcade into open town square

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress walking down the stairs

entered.detail: wide stone staircase ascending to upper level
tall palm tree visible in the open square above
two-story colonial building with wooden balcony

segments.scene_description: Ascending a wide stone staircase from the covered arcade into a bright open town square. Palm trees and colonial buildings become visible as the character emerges from the enclosed passage and turns right at the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: open colonial town square with palm trees and market activity

events.description: turns left while walking through town square

agents.ego_description: walking through open town square with palm trees, passing merchants and townspeople

notable_agents.action: man pushing cart loaded with hay bales across the square

entered.detail: wooden cart loaded with hay bales pulled by a man

segments.scene_description: Exploring an open colonial town square surrounded by two-story buildings with balconies. Palm trees dot the area while townspeople walk about, and a hay cart is visible in the center of the square.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow colonial street leading toward harbor district

events.description: passes close to building wall on right, temporarily narrowing field of view

agents.ego_description: walking along narrow colonial street toward harbor, passing by stone buildings

notable_agents.action: man leaning against wall with arms crossed

entered.detail: stone archway marking entrance to harbor district
red fabric canopy stretched between buildings overhead

segments.scene_description: Walking along narrower colonial streets toward the harbor district. The path is flanked by weathered stone buildings with occasional vegetation, and an archway marking the harbor entrance appears in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: harbor promenade with ships and stone seawalls

events.description: emerges from narrow street onto open harbor promenade with view of ships and water
turns right to walk along waterfront facing the harbor

agents.ego_description: walking along harbor promenade, approaching the waterfront with tall ships

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress standing near stone wall looking at ships

entered.detail: large wooden sailing ship with multiple masts and rigging
bright turquoise harbor water visible between ships
weathered stone wall along waterfront edge
stack of wooden barrels on dockside

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the harbor promenade with views of tall sailing ships and bright turquoise water. The stone walkway runs alongside a seawall where wooden barrels are stacked, and the character turns to walk along the waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock with moored sailing ships

events.description: steps from stone promenade onto wooden dock extending over turquoise water
turns left while walking along wooden pier

agents.ego_description: walking along wooden dock beside turquoise water, passing moored sailing ships

notable_agents.action: man sitting on dock edge fishing in the harbor

entered.detail: weathered wooden dock planks extending over water
small wooden boat moored alongside the dock

segments.scene_description: Walking along a weathered wooden dock extending over the clear turquoise harbor water. Large sailing ships are moored alongside the pier, and a fisherman sits on the dock edge while the character continues toward the ships.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the enclosed shadows of a colonial arcade into the bright, expansive openness of a Caribbean harbor. It begins within a covered stone corridor featuring blue walls and high arched ceilings, moving past stone columns and a wooden cart under filtered skylight. As the camera ascends a wide stone staircase, the enclosed passage opens into a sunlit town square filled with palm trees, two-story balconied buildings, and strolling townspeople. The scene then shifts into narrower colonial streets flanked by weathered stone walls before passing through a distant archway that reveals the harbor district. Finally, the camera emerges onto a stone promenade and follows a weathered wooden dock extending over turquoise water, passing stacked barrels and a seated fisherman toward the moored sailing ships.
